overall.description: First-person perspective footage from a video game showing a slow walk along a dark forest trail at night. The path is illuminated by a flashlight, revealing dirt ground, grass banks, and dense trees lining the route.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense forest trail with pine trees

agents.ego_description: walking cautiously along the narrow dirt path, sweeping the flashlight across the ground ahead

entered.detail: tall dark pine tree trunk lining the left side of the trail
uneven dirt and gravel trail illuminated by the flashlight
tall grass and undergrowth lining both sides of the path
dark silhouette of forest canopy against the night sky
light-colored boulder sitting beside the path on the left

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person walk through a dense forest trail at night. A flashlight illuminates the dirt path ahead, revealing a large pine tree trunk on the left and grass banks on the sides. Around the 9-second mark, a large rock becomes visible on the left side of the path.

events.description: path begins to open up with glimpses of a clearing visible through the trees ahead

agents.ego_description: continuing along the trail as the forest density decreases slightly ahead

entered.detail: open area visible through the tree line ahead with less dense vegetation

segments.scene_description: Continuing along the forest trail, the camera passes the large rock on the left, which falls behind. The pine tree trunk remains visible but moves further to the left-mid position as the path progresses. The trail ahead begins to open into a clearing, with the dense tree line giving way to a more open area visible in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person walk through a claustrophobic forest trail that gradually opens into a wider clearing. It begins with a flashlight cutting through the night to illuminate a dirt path flanked by grass banks and a large pine tree trunk on the left. As the camera advances, the beam reveals a large rock on the left side of the trail before passing it. The scene then shifts as the pine tree recedes further to the left, and the dense tree line begins to thin. Finally, the narrow path expands as the forest gives way to a more open area visible in the distance.
